_comment: DLT-registered SMS templates. Variable placeholders match DLT format. Do not change template structure without re-registering on DLT.

emergency_push.title: EMERGENCY ALERT - RoadPack

emergency_sms.template: ROADPACK ALERT: {name} accident at {address}. Map: {map_url}. Hospital: {hospital_name} {hospital_phone}. Call 112. Call {name}: {victim_phone}. Reply OK.

emergency_voice_tts.script_en: This is an emergency alert from RoadPack. {name} may have been in an accident at {address}. Their last known position was {landmark}. Please check on them or call 112. Press 1 to confirm you have received this message.
emergency_voice_tts.script_hi: Yeh RoadPack se ek emergency alert hai. {name} ka {address} par accident hua ho sakta hai. Kripya unhe check karein ya 112 par call karein. Is message ko confirm karne ke liye 1 dabayen.
emergency_voice_tts.script_ml: Ithu RoadPack il ninnum ulla oru emergency alert aanu. {name} kku {address} il accident undaayirikaam. Dayavayi avarude sthithi ariyukayo 112 il call cheyyukayo cheyyuka. Ee message sthireekarikkan 1 press cheyyuka.

non_arrival_user_checkin.title: Everything okay?
non_arrival_user_checkin.body: You usually arrive at {destination} by {expected_time}. It's {current_time}. Tap to let us know you're fine.

non_arrival_circle_alert.title: {name} hasn't arrived
non_arrival_circle_alert.body: {name} usually reaches {destination} by {expected_time}. They haven't arrived and didn't respond to our check-in.

lost_contact.title: Lost contact with {name}
lost_contact.body: We lost contact with {name} at {last_location} ({time_ago} ago). Their phone may be off or out of range.
